subject: Re: exported micrographs list has too few micrographs
body:
Hi Yingyi,

does 1300 correspond to any of the numbers you see in the overview 
statistics? Does the problem persist if you check/uncheck "generate files 
for RELION's polishing"?

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Wednesday, November 6, 2019 at 8:49:07 PM UTC+1, Yingyi Zhang wrote:
>
> Dear All,
>
> When I tried export micrograph list, it seemed like only part of my 
> micrographs got written in the star file. I have all together about 6000 
> micrographs.
> In warp/motion/ and warp/average, the total number of files are correct, 
> which is 6000 (doubled with log files) and 12000.
>
> And I have about 6000 images processed within warp, but the output only 
> has about 1300 images.
>
> When doing it, I clicked on all checkboxes, including both [Include items 
> outside of filter ranges], and [Include manually excluded items]. 
> It took a couple of minutes to get me the star file. 
>
> And I tried once again, still about 1300 images in the output star file.
> Do you know why? Could anyone help me with that?
>
> Many thanks.
> Best,
> Yingyi
>
>
>
